title: Why wasnt Asuka in Class 2A from the start
display_title: Why wasnt Asuka in Class 2A from the start
wikitext:
[]: Why wasn't Asuka in Class-2A from the start?             Quote Post by 0x2eleven » Sat Jun 05, 2010 8:29 pm All of the pilots in NGE aside from Asuka were in Class-2A from the start of the series and seem to have grown up together. If all of the students were kept together for protection all of their lives, why was Asuka separated from the group?

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sat Jun 05, 2010 8:33 pm Uh, they didn't grow up together. Rei transferred into the class in the middle of the previous year. Shinji transferred in between episodes two and three. Toji was only a candidate until Episode 17. Kaworu didn't show up until after class was canceled... permanently.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jun 05, 2010 8:49 pm Because there are different branches. And it's not like Tokyo-3 was the only branch with Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Jun 05, 2010 11:32 pm She's from fucking Germany.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jun 05, 2010 11:42 pm AuraTwilight wrote: She's from fucking Germany.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jun 06, 2010 3:52 am The recurrent motif seems to be "Be the mysterious transfer student... ...pilot giant robot."

[]:             Quote Post by Eudon » Sun Jun 06, 2010 6:27 am Another question is: why is Asuka attending school if she is already graduated at University? :0

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jun 06, 2010 6:33 am Eudon wrote: Another question is: why is Asuka attending school if she is already graduated at University? :0

[]:             Quote Post by Dark doom » Sun Jun 06, 2010 6:48 am Eudon wrote: Another question is: why is Asuka attending school if she is already graduated at University? :0

[]:             Quote Post by Eudon » Sun Jun 06, 2010 8:45 am Ye you're right I had forgotten 'bout ep 10

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jun 06, 2010 10:50 am Eudon wrote: Another question is: why is Asuka attending school if she is already graduated at University? :0

[]:             Quote Post by Dark doom » Sun Jun 06, 2010 10:53 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Idle hands are the devil's playground. Also, part of her job is to learn to get along with and work as a team with Shinji and Rei. Naturally, putting her in class with them is the most logical way of facilitating that. Also, what else is she going to do, sit around Misato's apartment and eat Cheetos? Also, it's a cartoon, and the narrative demands it.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jun 06, 2010 11:30 am Dark doom wrote: And what are Cheetos?

[]:             Quote Post by Dark doom » Sun Jun 06, 2010 12:56 pm 'Ouch'...................

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary
